name: get_docs_ls_sonicstar
note: Expected divergence: vanilla 2.2.0 has no ls_sonicstar registered. Rust-overlay returns the docstring assembled in SonicstarLookupService::get_documentation when sonicstar is enabled. Live parity via tests/sonicstar_live_parity.rs against sonicstar.net /api/overlay-parity/docs (step 10).
